The '''''Treespirit''''' was a [[Ghtroc Industries/Legends|Ghtroc]] [[720 light freighter/Legends|Class 720]] [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] owned by the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Grakkata]]. Painted a forest [[Color/Legends|green]] in remembrance of the Wookiee [[Kashyyyk/Legends|homeworld]], the [[Starship/Legends|craft]] appeared battered, but was extensively modified and heavily-armed with four retractable [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]].

*<!-- 1993-09-XX -->''[[Planets of the Galaxy, Volume Three]]''
